mapper.select: select va.id, va.appointment_time, va.appointment_status, va.guide_type, va.guide_id, ai.name apartment_name, gi.name, gi.url from view_appointment va left join apartment_info ai on va.apartment_id = ai.id and ai.is_deleted = 0 left join graph_info gi on gi.item_type = 1 and gi.item_id = ai.id and gi.is_deleted = 0 where va.is_deleted = 0 and va.user_id = #{userId} order by va.create_time desc

select va.id, va.user_id, va.name, va.phone, va.appointment_time, va.additional_info, va.appointment_status, va.guide_type, va.guide_id, ai.name apartment_name, gi.name, gi.url from view_appointment va left join apartment_info ai on va.apartment_id = ai.id and ai.is_deleted = 0 left join graph_info gi on gi.item_type = 1 and gi.item_id = ai.id and gi.is_deleted = 0 where va.is_deleted = 0 and va.guide_type = #{guideType} order by va.appointment_time desc

select va.id, va.user_id, va.name, va.phone, va.appointment_time, va.additional_info, va.appointment_status, va.guide_type, va.guide_id, ai.name apartment_name, gi.name, gi.url from view_appointment va left join apartment_info ai on va.apartment_id = ai.id and ai.is_deleted = 0 left join graph_info gi on gi.item_type = 1 and gi.item_id = ai.id and gi.is_deleted = 0 where va.is_deleted = 0 and va.guide_type = #{guideType} and va.guide_id = #{guideId} order by va.appointment_time desc

select va.id, va.user_id, va.name, va.phone, va.appointment_time, va.additional_info, va.appointment_status, va.guide_type, va.guide_id, ai.name apartment_name, gi.name, gi.url from view_appointment va left join apartment_info ai on va.apartment_id = ai.id and ai.is_deleted = 0 left join graph_info gi on gi.item_type = 1 and gi.item_id = ai.id and gi.is_deleted = 0 where va.is_deleted = 0 and va.room_id = #{roomId} order by va.appointment_time desc

select count(*) from view_appointment va left join room_info ri on va.room_id = ri.id and ri.is_deleted = 0 where va.is_deleted = 0 and ri.publisher_id = #{landlordId} and ri.publisher_type = 2 and va.guide_type = 2 -- 只统计选择房东带看的预约 and va.guide_id = #{landlordId} -- 确保带看人就是该房东

select count(*) from view_appointment va left join room_info ri on va.room_id = ri.id and ri.is_deleted = 0 where va.is_deleted = 0 and ri.publisher_id = #{landlordId} and ri.publisher_type = 2 and va.guide_type = 2 -- 只统计选择房东带看的预约 and va.guide_id = #{landlordId} -- 确保带看人就是该房东 and va.appointment_status = #{status}

select count(*) from view_appointment va left join room_info ri on va.room_id = ri.id and ri.is_deleted = 0 where va.is_deleted = 0 and ri.publisher_id = #{landlordId} and ri.publisher_type = 2 and va.guide_type = 2 -- 只统计选择房东带看的预约 and va.guide_id = #{landlordId} -- 确保带看人就是该房东 and DATE(va.appointment_time) = CURDATE()
